aboutIntro.primary: Multi-disciplinary engineer, leader, and student. I've shipped products across non-profits, government, and commercial teams — and I measure success by the strength of the people around me.

jobs.title: Spirit & Hammer
jobs.skills: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, Vercel AI SDK, Claude, MCP, Cloudflare
jobs.description: AI product studio & consulting agency — production-grade, full-stack AI platforms.
jobs.expandedContent:
▸ Shipped a full-stack AI circadian-health platform that turns any US zip code into real-time daily timing guidance, backed by an AI chat, a 50K-LOC FastAPI engine, dynamically-rendered Vercel AI UI components, and an MCP server exposing 14 tools to LLMs.
▸ Engineered offline-first, agent-editable apps on Cloudflare Workers with local-first sync, conflict resolution, and custom HMAC magic-link auth, all controllable through SSE-streaming AI chat with full undo.
▸ Architected end-to-end AI video pipelines that turn audio and transcripts into animated 1080p videos — automated scene segmentation, illustration, cinematography, and multilingual dubbing replacing manual editing.
▸ Built a YouTube intelligence platform with a multi-provider LLM abstraction and enrichment to improve the player experience.
▸ Built a complete personal-brand platform — blog, newsletter, lead capture, and the 'Unbinding' program — for relationship coach Hans Morningstar, handed off on Lovable so he edits the live site himself via plain-English AI prompts, not code.
▸ Embedded as AI engineering consultant for Intruex — building full-stack features, standing up the team's end-to-end AI agent harness (agent orchestration, MCP integration, skills config) for production LLM workflows, and adding Playwright coverage to catch regressions before release.

jobs.title: Capital One
jobs.skills: Security, Splunk, New Relic, PagerDuty, Springboot, Astro, SolidJS, Node.js, DevSecOps
jobs.description: Security & platform engineering for apps serving 3M+ daily users. Zero incidents.
jobs.expandedContent:
▸ Built high-traffic microservices and customer-facing features (Trade-In, Auto Loan Rates, SEO) in Astro, SolidJS, and Node.js — serving millions of daily users with zero production vulnerabilities.
▸ Ran production security monitoring and incident response in Splunk and New Relic: custom SPL threat-detection queries, real-time alerting dashboards, and 24/7 PagerDuty on-call.
▸ Drove reliability and security remediation across 3M+ DAU apps — Springboot upgrades, vulnerability patching, hardened CI/CD — cutting API failures by 100K.
▸ Won the internal hackathon for developer tooling that sped up code review by 40% org-wide.

jobs.title: Publicis Sapient
jobs.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, ArcGIS, AWS, Java, leadership
jobs.description: Led developers and feature rewrites — shipped ahead of schedule, raised company-wide velocity.
jobs.expandedContent:
▸ Built interactive healthcare-facility mapping in ArcGIS and Angular, letting officials map providers by region — increasing healthcare access 20% across underserved areas.
▸ Led code-review standardization and mentorship, cutting defect rates 33% and setting quality benchmarks adopted company-wide.
▸ Built an Angular Material UI component library for consistent cross-team patterns, accelerating delivery.

jobs.title: Radiant (now Maxar)
jobs.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Cesium, LeafletJS, ArcGIS, AWS, culture
jobs.description: Frontend engineer on mapping systems for national security. Culture champion.
jobs.expandedContent:
▸ Built geospatial mapping and probability-simulation tools in Cesium and LeafletJS for real-time intelligence visualization, supporting national-security decisions.
▸ Built data-visualization dashboards over large-scale geospatial datasets, helping analysts spot patterns across multi-dimensional threat landscapes.
▸ Championed engineering culture — mentorship, knowledge-sharing, and cross-team collaboration.

jobs.title: MITRE Corporation
jobs.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Python, Python Django, AWS, research
jobs.description: Engineer and researcher on national cloud, cyber-security, and tax-system initiatives.
jobs.expandedContent:
▸ Contributed to IRS tax-system modernization via cloud-migration R&D — OAuth2/JWT auth patterns and automated testing in Python Django and AWS.
▸ Prototyped cyber-security tooling for federal cloud infrastructure, building threat-detection monitoring across distributed systems.
▸ Built internal research platforms for cross-team work on national-security and public-interest technology.

jobs.title: Meal Fairy, LLC
jobs.skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Firebase, Stripe, startup, marketing
jobs.description: Founder of a plate-to-door food delivery startup in the greater Washington DC area.

jobs.title: America's Electric Cooperatives
jobs.description: Fullstack engineer for America's cooperatives — sustainable energy generation and cutting-edge research.

teaching.description: Taught and assisted across elementary, middle, and high schools in Fairfax County and Southern Bethesda — English and Math, including emotionally limited and special-needs students.

volunteering.description: Service across many initiatives: food drives, STEM students' Lego Mindstorm & ARCHR robotics demos, and local efforts for the underserved.

travel.description: Lived nomadically from the West Coast to Hawaii — stewarding sustainability in California and Hawaii ecovillages, car-camping across national parks in Washington, Oregon, and California.

jung.title: Applied Jung,
jung.skills: Analytical psychology, community men's work, embodiment & mindfulness
jung.description: Community building and Jungian individuation work — holding a space for men to learn healthy models of masculinity.

archr.title: Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots
archr.description: Lead developer of a haptic teleoperation system for high-DOF humanoid robots, letting untrained operators control complex robots for disaster response. One-to-one hand-puppeteered mimicry over Oculus VR streaming, driving ARCHR, Mini-Hubo, and Baxter. Published to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015; taken to the DARPA Robotics Challenge.

solar.title: Solar Workspace
solar.description: Lead CAD designer (Solidworks wiring schematics and 3D mechanicals) for a solar-powered outdoor study hub — the university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project, uniting electrical, mechanical, and civil students on a sustainable campus installation.

dome.title: DC Dome Light
dome.description: Research project designing a portable dome light in Solidworks 3D, with wiring schematics, for the travel industry.

publishedWorks.title: Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots
publishedWorks.description: A haptic teleoperation system for high-DOF humanoid robots, letting untrained operators control complex robots for disaster response. Submitted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015; taken to the DARPA Robotics Challenge.

publishedWorks.title: Open Modeling Framework Demand Response
publishedWorks.description: A cost-benefit model for demand-response programs at rural electric cooperatives, built on NRECA's Open Modeling Framework — simulating TOU, CPP, PTR, and DLC programs.

education.description: Hands-on engineer and campus innovator — published robotics research, won pitch competitions, and delivered the university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project.

narrative.title: Wellbeing by Design
narrative.content: Engineering is not neutral. Every system either improves or diminishes human wellbeing. My work deliberately chooses the former — building products that serve millions securely, making healthcare more accessible, and eliminating the failures that frustrate real people.
narrative.highlight: The through-line across every role: technology in service of people.

narrative.title: Impact at Scale
narrative.content: 3M+ daily users served with zero security incidents. 40% faster code reviews. 33% fewer defects. 100K API failures eliminated. 20% increase in healthcare access.
narrative.highlight: Measured not by lines shipped, but by lives improved.

narrative.title: In The Arena
narrative.content: It is not the critic who counts. I ship products, teach students, volunteer in communities, found startups, build robots, and hold space for others to grow. Multi-disciplinary by practice, not by label.

narrative.title: Continue
narrative.content: Ready to build something that matters?
